data.body:
Did you know that you can set up a reminder to add alt text? Alt text helps vision impaired posters understand images. 
Go to Settings, then Accessibility, and make sure "Require alt text before posting" is toggled on - this will prompt you each time you add an image to your post!

data.body:
Scotland's electricity grid is 100% carbon free once again, and exporting lots of power south to support Wales and England.

During our evening peak demand all electric hobs and ovens, lighting, TVs, washing machines, heat-pumps, direct electrical heating, charging of EVs etc. are all carbon free.
